title: Operator Mandate
description: Verifiable authorization issued by an operator, defining what an agent may do on which platforms. See CDP.md §5.2. Discovery is never authorization; the mandate is.

mandate_id.description: Unique identifier for this mandate, e.g. a UUID.

supersedes.description: mandate_id of the prior mandate this one replaces, e.g. after a runtime mandate-expansion (CDP-M.12) or rotation. The superseded mandate is no longer valid.

items.description: Platform origin (scheme + domain), e.g. 'https://api.collegadigitale.com'. The agent MUST NOT register anywhere not listed here (CDP-M.1).

scope.description: Actions the agent may perform autonomously. Anything not listed requires escalation to the operator (CDP-M.5). The sensitive scopes 'accept_engagements', 'negotiate_rates', and 'incur_costs' require a signature (CDP-M.4).

terms_hash.description: SHA-256 of the terms document accepted, so later changes are detectable.

accepted_terms.description: Economic/legal terms the OPERATOR has accepted in advance (CDP-M.3). Terms not listed here require runtime escalation.

max_rate_amount.description: Maximum rate the agent may declare without escalation.

spending_limits.description: Ceiling on costs the agent may incur autonomously (paid tools, services, expenses). Required for the 'incur_costs' scope; reaching a limit triggers escalation, not override (CDP-M.10).

total.description: Lifetime cap across all engagements under this mandate.

revocation.description: How this mandate can be revoked before valid_until (CDP-M.9). When status_url is present, the agent MUST check it before sensitive actions.

status_url.description: Endpoint returning the live status of this mandate, e.g. {"mandate_id":"...","status":"active|revoked","checked_at":"..."}.

max_cache_seconds.description: How long a platform MAY cache a status response. Omit or 0 to require a fresh check every time.

signature.description: Detached signature over the canonical JSON of this mandate (without this field). SHOULD be present; platforms SHOULD verify (CDP-M.4).

public_key.description: Operator public key (base64 or PEM). Distribution/trust of operator keys is platform policy.
